# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

ings_internal;-labsl_int128;-labsl_base;-labsl_spinlock_wait;-labsl_throw_delegate;-labsl_raw_logging_internal;-labsl_log_severity;-L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libspatialite/5.1.0_4/lib;-lspatialite;-lminizip;-lrttopo;-lfreexl;-liconv;-lproj;-lz;-L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/geos/3.14.1/lib;-L/opt/homebrew/opt/libxml2/lib;-lxml2;-L/opt/homebrew/opt/sqlite/lib;-lm;-lsqlite3;-L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/luajit/2.1.1774896198/lib;-lluajit-5.1;-lm;-ldl;-lgeos_c;-lgeos;-lstdc++;-lm;-L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib;-lssl;-lcrypto;-L/opt/homebrew/opt/lz4/lib;-llz4
